message:
feat(hostcall): add superinstruction compiler for hot typed-hostcall opcode traces

Introduce HostcallSuperinstructionCompiler that mines repeated opcode windows
from hostcall dispatch traces and emits fused superinstruction plans with
estimated cost deltas.

New module src/hostcall_superinstructions.rs (472 lines):
- HostcallSuperinstructionPlan: serializable plan with schema versioning,
  opcode window, support count, and expected cost savings
- HostcallSuperinstructionCompiler: configurable min_support and max_window
  parameters, compile() method that scans trace windows of decreasing size,
  deduplicates by trace signature, and returns plans sorted by cost delta
- Cost model: base opcode cost (10 units each) vs fused cost (6 + 2*steps),
  yielding positive delta when window length >= 3
- Trace signature generation via pipe-delimited opcode joining

Registered as pub mod hostcall_superinstructions in lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
